name: Review Working Tree
when_to_use: Cursor or another agent changed files and the user wants Claude Code to review uncommitted work

name: Review Branch Diff
when_to_use: The user wants Claude Code to review committed branch changes against a base ref

name: Second Opinion
when_to_use: The user wants Claude Code to analyze a technical decision, bug, plan, architecture, or repo question

name: Cross-Project Reflection
when_to_use: A reflection workflow wants Claude Code to identify recurring mistakes, user feedback patterns, and improvements across projects rather than reviewing the current repo

name: Prepare Prompt Only
when_to_use: The user wants a safe Claude Code prompt or command without invoking the CLI yet

name: Claude Ultrareview
when_to_use: The user wants Claude Code's hosted multi-agent branch or PR review
